import{createContext,useEffect,useState,useContext}from"react";import emailjs from'@emailjs/browser';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export default function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[users,setUsers]=useState(()=>{const storedUsers=localStorage.getItem('users');return storedUsers?JSON.parse(storedUsers):[{mobile:'1234567890',email:'test@example.com',userId:'user1'}];});const[otpStore,setOtpStore]=useState({});// Temporary store for OTPs
const[emailOtpStore,setEmailOtpStore]=useState({});// Temporary store for email OTPs
useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem('users',JSON.stringify(users));},[users]);const sendOTP=async mobile=>{// Real SMS integration using Twilio REST API
// WARNING: This exposes API keys in frontend - use backend for production
const otp=Math.floor(100000+Math.random()*900000).toString();setOtpStore(prev=>({...prev,[mobile]:otp}));const accountSid=process.env.REACT_APP_TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID;const authToken=process.env.REACT_APP_TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN;const fromNumber=process.env.REACT_APP_TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER;if(!accountSid||!authToken||!fromNumber){console.log(`OTP for ${mobile}: ${otp}`);// Fallback to console if no keys
return true;}try{const response=await fetch(`https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/${accountSid}/Messages.json`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Authorization':'Basic '+btoa(`${accountSid}:${authToken}`),'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},body:new URLSearchParams({From:fromNumber,To:mobile,Body:`Your OTP is: ${otp}`})});if(response.ok){console.log('SMS sent successfully');}else{console.error('Failed to send SMS:',await response.text());}}catch(error){console.error('Error sending SMS:',error);}return true;};const sendEmailVerification=email=>{// Real email integration using EmailJS
const otp=Math.floor(100000+Math.random()*900000).toString();setEmailOtpStore(prev=>({...prev,[email]:otp}));// EmailJS configuration - replace with your service details
const serviceId=process.env.REACT_APP_EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID;const templateId=process.env.REACT_APP_EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID;const publicKey=process.env.REACT_APP_EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY;const templateParams={to_email:email,otp:otp};emailjs.send(serviceId,templateId,templateParams,publicKey).then(response=>{console.log('Email sent successfully!',response.status,response.text);},error=>{console.error('Failed to send email:',error);});return true;};const verifyOTP=(mobile,otp)=>{return otpStore[mobile]===otp;};const verifyEmailOTP=(email,otp)=>{return emailOtpStore[email]===otp;};const logIn=(mobile,otp)=>{if(verifyOTP(mobile,otp)){const found=users.find(u=>u.mobile===mobile);if(found){setUser({mobile,userId:found.userId});setOtpStore(prev=>{const newStore={...prev};delete newStore[mobile];return newStore;});return true;}}return false;};const signUp=(mobile,otp,email)=>{if(verifyOTP(mobile,otp)){const exists=users.some(u=>u.mobile===mobile||u.email===email);if(exists)return{success:false,message:'Mobile number or email already registered'};const userId='user'+Date.now();// Generate unique user ID
const newUser={mobile,email,userId};setUsers(prev=>[...prev,newUser]);setUser({mobile,userId});setOtpStore(prev=>{const newStore={...prev};delete newStore[mobile];return newStore;});return{success:true,userId};}return{success:false,message:'Invalid OTP'};};const logOut=()=>setUser(null);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{user,logIn,signUp,logOut,sendOTP,sendEmailVerification,verifyEmailOTP},children:children});}export const useAuth=()=>useContext(AuthContext);
